comment: Airwindows ToVinyl4 port candidate. Mid/side cascaded one-pole lowpasses, de-essing antialias trigger, and groove-wear moving averages. State lives in ctx[3]; dither tail omitted (matches existing Airwindows ports).
gid_comment: 0x07 = SFX category. Same family as BitCrush; vinyl-emulation lo-fi belongs here for the MS-70CDR.
fxid_comment: 0x0196 in the custom Airwindows range (next after VerbTiny 0x0195).

params.name: Bright
params.comment: Airwindows A. Mid lowpass cutoff (low = darker).

params.name: SideRll
params.comment: Airwindows B. Side lowpass cutoff (low = more mono in bass).

params.name: Dehiss
params.comment: Airwindows C. De-ess / antialias trigger intensity.

params.name: Wear
params.source_formula: fMid taps span D*9+1 samples; fSide taps span D*4.5+1 samples (moving-average groove wear)
